commit_message:
Initial memory agent for ICache UVM tests Initial memory agent for ICache UVM tests The main patch is the first in the sequence: the second just disables PMP/memory errors to work around a bug in some different code, so we can land this PR independently of that fix.

Here's the commit message for the first patch:

> **Initial memory agent for ICache UVM testbench**
> 
> As with the core agent, this doesn't yet have any proper monitoring,
> and the testbench has no scoreboard, so we're not
